title: Design System from GOV.UK
content: # GOV.UK Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Subscribe Design System from Directories: Components: GOV.UK Design System offers a comprehensive framework for creating government services that align with the GOV.UK style. It comprises a collection of styles, components, and patterns designed to streamline the development of accessible digital services. Design System places a strong emphasis on accessibility and inclusivity for a diverse audience, with the goal of unifying government digital services and enhancing user experiences. Accessibility Color System Component overview Repository Icons Illustrations Layout Patterns Spacing Storybook Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Breadcrumb Button Checkbox Data table Date picker Form Link List Page header Pagination Radio button Select Tabs Tag Text area Text field
